title: Redirected
description: Memory optimization mod that prevents duplication of Enum values.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef6096f9885cdc3d052c8568d249fd693823c86c_0.webp)
Redirected is an updated multiloader port of [Redirector](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/redirector), a mod that reduces the memory usage of Minecraft by preventing unnecessary creation of enum value arrays. 

![separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/706a8701014fd4b3be38dbf254fa7d2c69e1234c.png)
**[![](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512?label=Luna%20Pixel&color=393939&labelColor=0843bf&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/nRQKp3Thsz)     [![](https://img.shields.io/discord/901654795100749884?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white&label=Txni&labelColor=36633c&color=393939)](https://discord.gg/kS7auUeYmc)   [![!<a href=](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Github&color=393939&labelColor=666666&style=for-the-badge&logo=Github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/txnimc/Redirected)    [![!<a href=](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=CurseForge&color=393939&labelColor=fb594a&style=for-the-badge&logo=CurseForge&logoColor=white)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/txni/projects)      [![!<a href=](https://img.shields.io/static/v1?label=&message=Modrinth&color=393939&labelColor=33de61&style=for-the-badge&logo=Modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/user/Txni)**
![separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/706a8701014fd4b3be38dbf254fa7d2c69e1234c.png)

Features:
- Replaces expensive Enum array clones in over 100 places in Minecraft code
- Reduces memory allocation rate
- Fixes issues with the original mod
